problems.title: StudyBuddy AI Homework Planner
problems.projectBrief: Schools increasingly assign homework across multiple digital platforms, making it difficult for students to keep track of tasks and deadlines. StudyBuddy solves this by creating an AI-powered planner that automatically collects assignments from different systems and organises them into a personalised study schedule. The app also provides reminders, progress tracking, and accessibility features for students with different learning needs. The goal is to launch a minimum viable product (MVP) before the new school term begins.

stages.title: Stage 1 â€” Market Research
stages.description: You must decide how to validate the idea with students.

choices.text: Skip research and start building immediately

stages.title: Stage 2 â€” Core System Development
stages.description: The team begins building the core scheduling engine.

stages.title: Stage 3 â€” User Experience Design
stages.description: The UX team works on improving usability.

choices.text: Inclusive design testing with diverse students

stages.title: Stage 4 â€” Unexpected Issue: Accessibility Complaint
stages.description: During testing, visually impaired students report difficulty navigating the interface.

stages.title: Stage 5 â€” Security & Privacy Review
stages.description: Your app stores personal student data, raising privacy concerns.

stages.title: Stage 6 â€” Marketing Campaign
stages.description: You must promote the app before launch.

problems.title: SafeChat Gaming Moderation Tool
problems.projectBrief: Online gaming communities often suffer from harassment and toxic behaviour, making them unsafe for younger players. SafeChat is a moderation platform designed to detect harmful messages in real time using machine learning. The tool is offered to game developers as an API that automatically scans messages, flags harassment, and protects players. The goal is to release the first version before a major gaming convention where several studios will evaluate the product.

stages.title: Stage 1 â€” Dataset Collection
stages.description: You must collect training data for the AI moderation system.

choices.text: Collect diverse datasets from multiple gaming communities

stages.title: Stage 2 â€” Build AI Moderation System
Stage 3 â€” Platform Integration
stages.description: You must integrate the system with gaming platforms.

stages.title: Stage 4 â€” Crisis: AI Bias Issue
stages.description: The system incorrectly flags messages from certain dialects.

stages.title: Stage 6 â€” Industry Partnerships
stages.description: Choose who to team up with.

stages.title: Stage 7 â€” Final Launch
stages.description: Decide on the scale of release.
